fields.label: Recognize delay (ms)
fields.help: Pen pause before letters are recognized. Default 900 ms — room to think or lift between boxes. Lower = snappier; higher = more time mid-word.

fields.label: Ink panel flush (ms)
fields.help: How often dirty pen ink is pushed to the panel while writing. Default 2. Lower = snappier ink; too low can queue waveform work.

fields.label: Soft new-game refresh
fields.help: off (default) = classic full-panel refresh on New Game (cleaner, no ghosts). on = skip the flash for a faster new game.
